description: Pixelesq is an AI-native website management platform for creating, editing, and publishing website content, pages, forms, and related SEO or analytics workflows. Its Claude/ChatGPT integration lets users manage Pixelesq projects conversationally through an MCP server.
summary: Pixelesq exposes a public MCP server at `https://pixelesq-mcp.pixelesq.workers.dev/mcp`, authenticated by Pixelesq account sign-in via OAuth-style connector login (Google or email OTP).
